FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Find answers to common questions about Lotus Academy
FAQ.Q1: How do I get started with Lotus Academy?
FAQ.A1: Simply create a free account, browse our course catalog, and enroll in any course that interests you.
FAQ.Q2: Are certificates provided upon course completion?
FAQ.A2: Yes, you'll receive a verified certificate of completion with a unique QR code for each course you finish.

WHY.TITLE: Why Learn With Lotus Academy?
WHY.SUBTITLE: Join thousands of successful traders who started their journey here
WHY.REASON1_DESC: Learn from professionals with decades of experience at top hedge funds and investment banks.
WHY.REASON2_DESC: Practice with real market data and build strategies that work in actual trading environments.
WHY.REASON3_DESC: Follow a carefully designed learning path from fundamentals to advanced trading strategies.

FOOTER.DESC: Learn from expert instructors with professional-grade video content and real-world trading strategies.
